zh.lifeSummary: 當Pagamus De Turberville於1140年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根布利其史德時，他的父親Gilbert De Turberville20歲，母親Agnes11137歲。他與Sara verch Morgan of Glamorgan結婚。他們至少是7個兒子的父母。他去世於1207年在英國威爾斯洛達 辛 塔福利安哈利享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Pagamus De Turberville于1140年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根布利其史德时，他的父亲Gilbert De Turberville20岁，母亲Agnes11137岁。他与Sara verch Morgan of Glamorgan结婚。他们至少是7个儿子的父母。他去世于1207年在英国威尔斯洛達 辛 塔福利安哈利享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Turberville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name, probably from Thouberville (Eure), or possibly from Trubleville (Seine-Maritime), both in France. The two may have been confused in surname usage.

variants.name: Torbet
meanings: from the Anglo-Norman and Middle English personal name T(h)urbert, T(h)orbert, a hybrid of Old Norse Thorr ‘Thor’, the name of the god of thunder, + ancient Germanic -berht ‘bright, famous’. The name was probably formed on the Continent; see Turberville .
perhaps in some cases a nickname from Old French and Middle English turbot, turbut ‘turbot’, for someone who caught or sold or resembled this fish.

variants.name: Tuberville
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Turberville  . This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Turville
meanings: English (Surrey and Hampshire; of Norman origin):
habitational name from Tourville‐la‐Campagne (Eure, France). The placename derives from the Old Norse personal name Thórr + Old French ville ‘farmstead, estate’ (from Latin villa).
occasionally a shortened form of   Turberville  .

variants.name: Troublefield
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Turberville  .

en.lifeSummary: When Pagamus De Turberville was born in 1140, in Bridgend, Glamorgan, Wales, his father, Gilbert De Turberville, was 20 and his mother, Agnes, was 11137. He married Sara verch Morgan of Glamorgan. They were the parents of at least 7 sons. He died in 1207, in Llanharry, Rhondda Cynon Taf, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Pagamus De Turberville est né en 1140, à Bridgend, Glamorgan, Galles, son père, Gilbert De Turberville, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Agnes, avait 11137 ans. Il a épousé Sara verch Morgan of Glamorgan. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils. Il est décédé en 1207, à Llanharry, Rhondda Cynon Taf, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans.

Lui sposato Sara verch Morgan of Glamorgan. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli. Morì nel 1207, nel Llanharry, Rhondda Cynon Taf, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Pagamus De Turberville(이)가 1140년 웨일스 글램르건 브리지드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert De Turberville(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes(은)는 11137세였다. 그는 Sara verch Morgan of Glamorgan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1207년 영국 웨일스 호다 신넌 타프 랜해리에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Pagamus De Turberville родился в 1140 г. в местности бридженд, глэморган, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Gilbert De Turberville было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes, 11137. Он женился на женщине по имени Sara verch Morgan of Glamorgan. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей. Он умер в 1207 г. в местности лланарри, рондда синон таф, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет.
